name: Overall Preference
insight: Currently #1 in blind user votes on LMArena with 1503 Elo. Gemini 3.1 Pro close behind at 1493.

name: Coding & Engineering
insight: Crushes it on planning, debugging, and self-correction. Many devs have switched and aren't looking back.

name: Hard Reasoning & Science
insight: Leads on PhD-level benchmarks like GPQA and ARC-AGI subsets. Claude and Grok are strong contenders.

name: Honest Daily Use
insight: Shines for maximally truthful, witty conversation. Great for brainstorming without corporate polish.
